name: card
visual_summary: A visually appealing Card component for rendering information. It can be used to display a title, description, and content in a structured and readable format. Developers can use it in various contexts where they need to present data in a clear and concise manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: card
Description: A visually appealing Card component for rendering information. It can be used to display a title, description, and content in a structured and readable format. Developers can use it in various contexts where they need to present data in a clear and concise manner.
Style: minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: disabled, hover
Tags: layout, data-display

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
